# Fixture Vocabulary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/figmaboundarydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Figma AI Agent Daemon Boundary](../figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.md)

Figma and older discussions used "template" loosely, but current SSOT has no daemon-owned agent template entity.

`에이전트 선택` is the fixture-selection entry. No fixture catalog ownership. Fixture selection creates a normal agent upstream; daemon only consumes that agent after assignment.

Client-owned fixture facts: fixture rows for 리도/영실/홍도/지원, direct-setting row, preview skeleton, disabled-next presentation.

Daemon never hardcodes fixture catalog, descriptions, or instruction copy; it only receives the assignment-time instruction/runtime/model snapshot.
